subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-24
subcodes.first_line: It affects the hearts. Conquering is not impressive. Humility makes impression. See what a conqueror David was. He conquered countries
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @martyrs and martyrdom, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @non-participation in politics
